address_type.text: ประเภทที่อยู่

combo.address_type: 0=ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน/1=ที่อยู่ตามทะเบียนบ้าน

root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no, sc_mem_edit_address.operate_date, sc_mem_edit_address.entry_id, sc_mem_edit_address.address_type,
trim(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_address_no ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban , null , null ,'มบ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo , null , null ,'ม.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi , null , null ,'ซ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road , null , null ,'ถ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code , '010' , 'แขวง'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol) , 'ต.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol))) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code , '010' , 'เขต'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code) , 'อ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code))||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code , null , null ,'จ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code)) ||' '|| sc_mem_edit_address.pre_postcode||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone , null , null ,'โทร.'||sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone ))) as old_address,
trim(sc_mem_edit_address.address_no ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.mooban , null , null ,'มบ'||sc_mem_edit_address.mooban) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.moo , null , null ,'ม.'||sc_mem_edit_address.moo) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.soi , null , null ,'ซ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.soi) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.road , null , null ,'ถ.'||sc_mem_edit_address.road) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.tambol , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code , '010' , 'แขวง'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.tambol) , 'ต.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_sub_district_name (sc_mem_edit_address.tambol))) ||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.district_code , null , null ,decode(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code , '010' , 'เขต'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.district_code) , 'อ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code,sc_mem_edit_address.district_code))||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code , null , null ,'จ.'||PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_edit_address.province_code)) ||' '|| sc_mem_edit_address.postcode||' '|| decode(sc_mem_edit_address.telephone , null , null ,'โทร.'||sc_mem_edit_address.telephone ))) as new_address
from sc_mem_edit_address where 1=1 --and sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no = '055793' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_edit_address.operate_date, sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no
